title: Chairing Debates
description: Moderating fairly: time control, steel-manning both sides, interrupting the dominant voice.
summary_pt_br: Moderando debate: 'Vamos ouvir o outro lado', 'No interesse do tempo', 'Pra garantir que ouvimos X'.

scenes.subtitle_en: Moderating fairly: time control, steel-manning both sides, interrupting the dominant voice.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Moderando debate: 'Vamos ouvir o outro lado', 'No interesse do tempo', 'Pra garantir que ouvimos X'.

scenes.text_en: Moderating fairly: time control, steel-manning both sides, interrupting the dominant voice. Focus: chairing debates. Let's hear from the other side of the argument now.
scenes.text_pt: Moderando debate: 'Vamos ouvir o outro lado', 'No interesse do tempo', 'Pra garantir que ouvimos X'. Foco: chairing debates. Vamos ouvir o outro lado do argumento agora.

scenes.title: Chairing Debates
scenes.body_en: Moves: 'Let's hear from the other side.' 'In the interest of time...' 'I want to make sure we hear X's point.' 'Can you land that thought in one sentence?'
scenes.body_pt: Moderando debate: 'Vamos ouvir o outro lado', 'No interesse do tempo', 'Pra garantir que ouvimos X'.

examples.en: Let's hear from the other side of the argument now.
examples.pt: Vamos ouvir o outro lado do argumento agora.

examples.en: In the interest of time, can you land that in one sentence?
examples.pt: Pelo tempo, pode fechar em uma frase?

examples.en: I want to make sure we hear from our quieter voices.
examples.pt: Quero garantir que ouvimos as vozes mais quietas.

exercise.question: Complete: "Let's hear from the other side of the ___ now."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "Let's hear from the other side of the argument now."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Vamos ouvir o outro lado do argumento agora.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
In the interest of time, can you land that in one sentence?
exercise.explanation: Correct: "In the interest of time, can you land that in one sentence?"
exercise.hint_pt_br: Pelo tempo, pode fechar em uma frase?

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Chairing Debates — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre chairing debates. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Zara, one panelist is dominating. Intervene.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Let's hear from the other side now.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: A guest rambles for two minutes.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: In the interest of time, land it briefly?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I want to hear your thoughts on this.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Let's return to the original question.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Recap the debate at the end.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Here are the three cruxes we surfaced.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Chairing is the quietest form of leadership.

scenes.title: The moderated panel
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Describe Zara's four chairing moves. Use at least three moderation phrases.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: At the annual conference, Zara chaired a panel where three strong personalities threatened to talk over each other constantly.

paragraphs.speaker: Zara
paragraphs.en: Let's hear from the other side of the argument now — we've spent eight minutes on one perspective.

paragraphs.speaker: Panelist
paragraphs.en: But the core point I was making about causation versus correlation deserves a full hearing before we pivot.

paragraphs.speaker: Zara
paragraphs.en: In the interest of time, can you land that thought in one sentence so others can respond in turn?

paragraphs.speaker: Zara
paragraphs.en: Before we close, I want to make sure we hear from our quieter voices on the third question specifically.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Chairing well, Zara believed, is the quietest form of leadership — invisible when it works, obvious when it fails.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Chairing Debates". Moderating fairly: time control, steel-manning both sides, interrupting the dominant voice. Let's hear from the other side of the argument now. In the interest of time, can you land that in one sentence? Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Chairing Debates". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
